article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.13. CR - Supply and Delivery of Fence Rental 2026-02-10.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on $267,000 fence rental contract renewal with Super Save
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on renewing a temporary fence rental contract with Super Save Fence Rentals Inc. for $267,000 (taxes included), covering June 1, 2026 to May 31, 2027.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision on February 10, 2026 — this affects fence rental supply in Burnaby.

key_dates.label: Burnaby fence rental contract renewal period starts — Super Save Fence Rentals
Burnaby fence rental contract renewal period ends — Super Save Fence Rentals
